net.sf.saxon.expr

Interface LocalBinding

  • All Superinterfaces:
    Binding
    All Known Implementing Classes:
    Assignation, EagerLetExpression, ForExpression, JAXPVariable, LetExpression, LocalParam, LocalVariableBinding, OuterForExpression, PositionVariable, QuantifiedExpression, UserFunctionParameter, XPathParserPE.TemporaryXSLTVariableBinding, XPathVariable

    public interface LocalBinding
extends Binding
    Binding for local variables and parameters: anything that is allocated a slot on the XPathContext stack frame.

    • Method Summary

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      int getLocalSlotNumber()
      Return the slot number of the variable held on the local stack frame

      • Methods inherited from interface net.sf.saxon.expr.Binding

        addReference, evaluateVariable, getIntegerBoundsForVariable, getRequiredType, getVariableQName, isAssignable, isGlobal

    • Method Detail

      • getLocalSlotNumber

        int getLocalSlotNumber()
        Return the slot number of the variable held on the local stack frame
        Returns:
        the slot number on the local stack frame
